title: Moss's DnD 2
body:
As the sequel to Moss's DnD, this modpack proves to be the updated ultimate RPG experience. Choose your species, class, skills, and jobs. Use Armourer's workshop to create your own armor or robes. Become a paladin and protect your allies, become a bezerker and brawl your enemies, or become an archer to snipe from a safe distance. 

With distant horizons, iris, towns and towers, terralith, and tectonic, your world will be a beautiful medieval fantasy world.

Go questing with your party and defeat the newly updated ender dragon, ultris bosses, and more.

What kind of hero will YOU be?

Note: For the full experience, get some friends and download the client version and create a server with the server file. If you don't have any friends download the regular file. And if you have a potato computer, download the lightweight version.
